name: CharMorph - Character Generator
creator: Upliner
card: Open-source character creation/morphing add-on. GitHub — route to L2 native-CI gate.

name: MPFB2 - MakeHuman for Blender
creator: makehumancommunity
card: Open-source human character generator (MakeHuman plugin for Blender). GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Tiny Eye - Procedural Eye Generator
creator: tinynocky
card: Free procedural eye generator. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Auto-Terrainer
creator: unicornhunter
card: Free automatic terrain generator add-on. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Buildify - Procedural Building Generator
creator: paveloliva
card: Canonical free Geometry-Nodes building generator; builds customizable buildings from part libraries, works with OSM add-on for cities. OWNER CHECKOUT IN PROGRESS -> probe on receipt in inputs/dropzone/. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: BookGen - Book Shelf Generator
creator: oweissbarth
card: Free add-on to generate rows of books on shelves. Open-source — route to L2 gate.

name: Celtic Knot Generator
creator: BorisTheBrave
card: Open-source Celtic knot generator from mesh edges. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Curtis Holt's Free Generators
creator: curtisjamesholt
card: Curtis Holt's free generator set on Gumroad (incl. City Scatter free, BY-GEN). click-to-get.

name: Data-FX
creator: LandonFerg
card: Open-source data-driven procedural FX add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Geometry Nodes Pipes
creator: raywakui
card: Free Geometry Nodes pipe generator. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Industrial Geonodes
creator: kofi
card: Free industrial geometry-node setups. click-to-get on Ko-fi.

name: Modular Tree
creator: MaximeHerpin
card: Well-known open-source node-based procedural tree generator. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Pleebs Free Generators
creator: pleebs
card: Pleebs' free procedural generator set on Gumroad. click-to-get.

name: Post USSR Builder
creator: kypcaht
card: Free procedural post-Soviet building generator. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Procedural Slime
creator: artichoke18
card: Free procedural slime setup. click-to-get on Gumroad.

creator: kofi
card: Free random book generator. click-to-get on Ko-fi.

name: Real Sky

card: Free procedural sky generator. click-to-get.

card: Free snow-accumulation generator on Superhive (formerly Blender Market). click-to-get.

name: Spaceship Generator
creator: a1studmuffin
card: Well-known open-source procedural spaceship generator add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Sprytile - Tilemap Modeling
creator: Sprytile
card: Open-source tilemap-based modeling add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Stylized Fantasy Tree Generator
creator: rc12

name: tree-gen

card: Open-source procedural tree generator (Weber-Penn). GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Welder - Procedural Weld Seams
creator: blenderartists
card: Free add-on generating procedural weld seams along edges. click-to-get via forum thread.

name: Infinigen - Procedural Nature Generator
creator: princeton-vl
card: Large open-source procedural generator of photorealistic natural worlds (terrain, plants, creatures, weather) built on Blender. GitHub — route to L2 gate; heavyweight.

name: Gscatter
creator: Graswald3D
card: Free node-based scattering system for vegetation/assets. click-to-get.

name: BagaPie Modifier
creator: bagapie
card: Well-known free GPL scatter/modifier add-on (buildings, nature, scattering via Geometry Nodes). click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: City Scatter (free)
creator: curtisjamesholt
card: Free city scatter add-on by Curtis Holt. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: ND - Non-Destructive Hard Surface
creator: hugemenace
card: Free non-destructive hard-surface add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Tissue - Computational Design
creator: alessandro-zomparelli
card: Well-known open-source computational/procedural tessellation + reaction-diffusion add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: RandoMesh
creator: mantissa-
card: Open-source procedural mesh-detailing add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: MegaGrid
creator: mantissa-
card: Open-source procedural greeble/grid detail add-on. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: BY-GEN - Generative Modeling
creator: curtisjamesholt
card: Free generative/non-destructive modeling add-on by Curtis Holt. GitHub — route to L2 gate.

name: Grungit - Procedural Grunge/Wear
creator: abdoubouam
card: Free GPL add-on adding procedural grunge/dirt/wear to materials one-click. click-to-get on Gumroad.

name: Material Maker - Procedural Materials
creator: RodZill4
card: Open-source node-based procedural material authoring tool (exports PBR maps for Blender). GitHub — adjacent tool.
